heading: Conformance of accessibility standards
label: 12163 Conformance of accessibility standards
text: Accessibility standards included in regulations issued under this subpart shall be consistent with the minimum guidelines issued by the Architectural and Transportation Barriers Compliance Board under .section 12204(a) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective 18 months after , see , set out as a note under .July 26, 1990section 246(a) of Pub. L. 101–336section 12161 of this title
